redFlags.title: High Debt Load
redFlags.detail: Your liabilities significantly outweigh your assets, indicating a high debt-to-asset ratio and potential financial stress.

redFlags.title: No Emergency Fund
redFlags.detail: No visible liquid savings or emergency reserves, risking financial instability in unexpected situations.

suggestions.title: Prioritize debt repayment
suggestions.detail: Focus on paying down your personal and housing loans to reduce interest burden and improve financial stability.

suggestions.title: Build liquid savings
suggestions.detail: Start saving at least 3-6 months of expenses in a liquid, accessible account for emergencies.

suggestions.title: Reduce discretionary spending
suggestions.detail: Cut back on frequent eating out, subscriptions, and non-essentials to increase savings.

suggestions.title: Create a budget
suggestions.detail: Track your expenses intentionally and set monthly saving targets to regain control.

positives.title: Valuable Assets
positives.detail: You own a 2BHK apartment worth around 9 million, which is significant long-term wealth.

positives.title: Good Asset Diversification
positives.detail: Having holdings in metals (gold) and property gives you some diversification.

c0fa89fe-70ff-4a41-aa99-16622274928f.summary: Your finances are fragile with a high debt burden, minimal savings, and potentially unsustainable spending habits. Immediate focus on debt repayment and building an emergency fund is crucial. You need a radical change in financial discipline to avoid future crises.
